name: Cherry Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare an 8-inch square cake pan by oiling and floured.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. Drain the water-packed sour cherries, reserving some for flavor.
4. Measure 1 cup of the drained cherries and set aside.
5. In a blender, puree together 1/2 cup sweet milk with 1/2 cup packed dates.
6. Blend oil, egg yolks, and applesauce in another bowl; set aside near the cherries.
7. In a small bowl, beat 2 egg whites until stiff and set aside.
8. In a large bowl, combine flours, white flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and spices; stir well.
9. Gradually mix the blended liquid ingredients into the dry ingredients until well moistened.
10. Gently fold in the reserved cherries.
11. Fold in the egg whites just until combined.
12. Pour the batter into the prepared cake pan and bake at 350°F (175°C) for 50 minutes.
13. Cool the cake to room temperature.
14. Refrigerate, covered.
